title: El mal del sauce
overview: Franco wakes up in an unknown place, not knowing how or why he got there. His disturbing memory reveals small fragments of what happened. Luciano is a young man with strange behavior who shares his father's confinement. Under dubious circumstances, he becomes the intermediary between Franco and the kidnappers, taking charge of his care and attention. Elena, an elegant and distinguished woman, has the inconceivable task of negotiating an uncertain ransom.
